steps.title: Identify the subject and its grammatical requirements
steps.content: The subject is the noun phrase its similarity to each of the 32 soil reference groups, where the head noun similarity is singular. The blank requires an auxiliary verb to form passive voice (verb + evaluated).

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement and tense consistency
steps.content:
is is singular present tense, matching the tense context of is classified and is found. are and have been fail the agreement rule by using plural forms, while was breaks tense consistency.

That confirms C is correct.
